sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71210" key="nuktiplanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ-πλᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n71210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νυκτιπλανῆ τελέθουσαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:268" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.268</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (vv. ll. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νυκτιπλανῆτιν τ.</foreign> (sic), <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νυκτιπλάνητον ἐοῦσαν</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
